question: How do I change my TechNova subscription plan?
answer: You can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime in your account settings under the Billing section. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. If you’re on a yearly plan, you’ll need to wait until renewal to adjust your tier.

question: What payment methods does TechNova accept?
answer: TechNova accepts all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for one-time purchases. Recurring subscriptions can be paid via credit card or direct debit. We do not accept cash or checks for online payments.

question: Can I use a different currency for billing?
answer: TechNova automatically bills in your local currency based on your billing address. If you need to switch currencies, update your address in your account settings and contact support to reprocess your invoice.

question: Why was I charged twice for the same invoice?
answer: Duplicate charges may occur if a payment fails and retries automatically. Check your payment history for pending transactions. If the issue persists, contact support with your invoice number for review.

question: How do I get a refund for a TechNova subscription?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after approval. You must cancel your subscription first, then submit a refund request via the support portal. Refunds are prorated based on unused time.

question: Does TechNova offer discounts for annual subscriptions?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides a 15% discount for annual subscriptions compared to monthly billing. You can switch to yearly in your account settings at any time.

question: Why did my payment method fail for my TechNova subscription?
answer: Failed payments may be due to expired cards, insufficient funds, or bank restrictions. Update your payment details in your account and retry. If the issue continues, contact your bank or TechNova support.

question: How do I view my past invoices on TechNova?
answer: Past invoices are available in your account under the Billing > Invoices section. You can download or print them as PDFs. Invoices are stored for up to 7 years for tax purposes.

question: Does TechNova charge sales tax on subscriptions?
answer: Sales tax is applied based on your billing address and local regulations. Tax rates are calculated automatically at checkout and displayed before finalizing payment.

question: Can I pay for a TechNova subscription with a gift card?
answer: TechNova gift cards can only be used for hardware purchases, not subscriptions. Subscriptions must be paid via credit card, PayPal, or bank transfer.

question: What happens if I cancel my TechNova subscription mid-billing cycle?
answer: You retain access until the end of your current billing period. No refunds are issued for partial months, but you won’t be charged again until renewal.

question: How do I update my billing address for TechNova?
answer: Update your billing address in your account settings under Profile > Billing. Changes take effect immediately for future invoices. Ensure the address matches your payment method to avoid issues.

question: Why is my TechNova invoice higher than the listed price?
answer: Invoices may include taxes, shipping fees, or prorated charges if you upgraded mid-cycle. Review the breakdown on the invoice for details. Contact support if discrepancies persist.

question: Can I split a TechNova subscription payment into installments?
answer: TechNova does not offer installment plans for subscriptions. All payments are processed in full at the start of each billing cycle. Hardware purchases may qualify for financing options.

question: How do I request a refund for a TechNova hardware purchase?
answer: Hardware refunds require returning the item in original condition within 30 days of purchase. Initiate a return request via the support portal and include your order number for processing.

question: Does TechNova offer enterprise pricing for large teams?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides custom enterprise plans with volume discounts. Contact our sales team to discuss pricing tailored to your organization’s needs.

question: Why did I receive a pro-rated charge after upgrading my TechNova plan?
answer: Prorated charges cover the remaining days of your current billing cycle at the new plan’s rate. The difference is calculated automatically and applied to your next invoice.

question: How do I dispute a charge on my TechNova invoice?
answer: Disputes must be submitted within 60 days of the invoice date via the support portal. Provide transaction details and reason for dispute; our team will investigate and respond within 10 business days.

question: Can I use a prepaid debit card to pay for my TechNova subscription?
answer: Prepaid debit cards are accepted as long as they have sufficient funds and are not restricted by the issuer. Ensure the card is active and not expired before attempting payment.

question: What is TechNova’s policy on failed payment retries?
answer: TechNova retries failed payments up to 3 times over 7 days. If all attempts fail, your subscription is paused until a valid payment method is provided. You’ll receive email notifications for each attempt.

question: How do I add a purchase order (PO) number to my TechNova invoice?
answer: PO numbers can be added during checkout in the Billing section. Enter the PO number in the designated field before finalizing your order. Invoices with PO numbers are sent separately to your finance team.

question: Does TechNova offer VAT/GST tax exemptions for businesses?
answer: Businesses may qualify for tax exemptions with valid documentation. Upload your tax exemption certificate in your account settings under Tax Information to apply.

question: Why was my TechNova subscription charged before the billing date?
answer: Early charges may occur if you upgraded your plan or added services mid-cycle. Review your invoice for the charge breakdown and contact support if the charge seems incorrect.

question: Can I use a different payment method for each TechNova subscription?
answer: No, each TechNova account uses a single default payment method for all subscriptions. You can update the payment method in your account settings at any time.

question: How do I request a refund for a canceled TechNova subscription?
answer: Refunds for canceled subscriptions are processed automatically if unused time remains. If you believe you’re owed a refund, submit a request via the support portal with your invoice details.

question: How do I create a TechNova account?
answer: Visit the TechNova website and click 'Sign Up' in the top-right corner. Enter your email, create a password, and follow the verification steps sent to your inbox. You can also sign up using your Google or Microsoft account for faster registration. Once verified, your account will be ready to use.

question: What information do I need to provide when signing up for TechNova?
answer: You only need a valid email address and a secure password to create a TechNova account. Optional details like your name or company can be added later in your profile settings. No payment information is required during sign-up unless you’re purchasing hardware. We recommend using a strong, unique password for security.

question: Why can’t I log in to my TechNova account?
answer: First, check that your email and password are entered correctly, as passwords are case-sensitive. If you’ve forgotten your password, use the 'Forgot Password' link to reset it. If the issue persists, your account may be locked due to too many failed attempts—contact support to unlock it.

question: How do I reset my TechNova password?
answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password' and enter the email associated with your account. You’ll receive a reset link via email within a few minutes. Follow the link to create a new password and log in with your updated credentials.

question: I didn’t receive a password reset email from TechNova. What should I do?
answer: Check your spam or junk folder, as the email may have been filtered there. If it’s still missing, ensure you entered the correct email address during sign-up. If the problem continues, try resetting your password again or contact support for assistance.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA) on my TechNova account?
answer: Go to your account settings and select 'Security.' Under 'Two-Factor Authentication,' choose your preferred method (authenticator app or SMS) and follow the setup instructions. Once enabled, you’ll need to enter a verification code each time you log in.

question: Can I disable two-factor authentication (2FA) for my TechNova account?
answer: Yes, you can disable 2FA anytime in your account settings under 'Security.' Select 'Disable Two-Factor Authentication' and confirm your decision. Note that disabling 2FA may reduce the security of your account.

question: I lost my phone with the 2FA app. How do I log in to TechNova?
answer: Use your backup codes (if you saved them) to log in temporarily. After logging in, disable 2FA in your account settings and set it up again on your new device. If you don’t have backup codes, contact support to verify your identity and regain access.

question: How do I update my email address on my TechNova account?
answer: Go to your account settings and select 'Profile.' Under 'Email,' enter your new address and confirm the change via the verification email sent to both your old and new emails. Once verified, your account will use the new email for all communications.

question: I changed my email but didn’t receive a verification link. What’s wrong?
answer: Check your spam folder for the verification email, as it may have been filtered there. If it’s missing, ensure the new email address was entered correctly in your account settings. If the issue persists, contact support to resolve the verification delay.

question: How do I update my profile picture on TechNova?
answer: Navigate to your account settings and select 'Profile.' Click the profile picture icon, then upload an image from your device. Adjust the crop as needed and save your changes. Supported formats include JPG, PNG, and GIF (max 5MB).

question: Can I change my TechNova username?
answer: Your TechNova username is tied to your account and cannot be changed directly. However, you can update your display name in your profile settings to reflect a preferred name. For account-specific changes, contact support for further assistance.

question: How do I delete my TechNova account?
answer: Go to your account settings and select 'Account Deletion.' Review the terms, confirm your decision, and follow the prompts to permanently delete your account. Note that this action cannot be undone, and all data will be erased.

question: What happens to my subscriptions if I delete my TechNova account?
answer: Deleting your account will immediately cancel all active subscriptions, including software licenses and hardware warranties. You’ll lose access to all TechNova services and data associated with the account. Refunds are processed according to our cancellation policy.

question: Can I recover a deleted TechNova account?
answer: No, once your TechNova account is deleted, it cannot be recovered. All data, including subscriptions, purchases, and settings, will be permanently erased. If you change your mind, you’ll need to create a new account and repurchase any services.

question: Why is my TechNova account locked?
answer: Your account may be locked due to suspicious activity, too many failed login attempts, or policy violations. Check your email for a notification explaining the reason. Contact support to verify your identity and unlock your account.

question: How do I unlock my TechNova account after it’s been locked?
answer: Follow the instructions in the email sent to your registered address to verify your identity. If you didn’t receive an email, contact support with proof of ownership to request an unlock. Avoid repeated failed login attempts to prevent further lockouts.

question: Can I merge two TechNova accounts into one?
answer: TechNova does not support merging multiple accounts into a single one. However, you can transfer subscriptions or purchases by contacting support with proof of ownership. Each account must be managed separately.

question: How do I add a payment method to my TechNova account?
answer: Go to your account settings and select 'Billing.' Choose 'Add Payment Method' and enter your card or PayPal details. You can also update or remove payment methods from this section as needed.

question: Why is my payment method declined on TechNova?
answer: Payment declines can occur due to insufficient funds, expired cards, or bank restrictions. Ensure your card details are up to date and try again. If the issue persists, contact your bank or use an alternative payment method.

question: How do I update my billing address on TechNova?
answer: Navigate to your account settings and select 'Billing.' Under 'Payment Methods,' choose the card you’d like to update and enter your new billing address. Save the changes to apply them to future transactions.

question: Can I have multiple users under one TechNova account?
answer: TechNova accounts are designed for individual use, but you can add team members to shared projects or subscriptions via the 'Collaboration' settings. Each user will need their own account for full access to features.

question: How do I close a team account on TechNova?
answer: Team accounts can only be closed by the account owner. Go to 'Team Settings' and select 'Close Team Account.' Confirm the action, and all associated data and subscriptions will be terminated. This cannot be undone.

question: What happens to my data if I cancel my TechNova subscription?
answer: Canceling your subscription will end access to premium features, but your data remains in your account for 30 days. After this period, all data will be permanently deleted unless you reactivate your subscription.

question: How do I reactivate a canceled TechNova subscription?
answer: Log in to your account and go to 'Billing.' Select 'Reactivate Subscription' and choose your preferred plan. Your access will be restored immediately, and you’ll retain any remaining billing cycle days.

question: How long does TechNova shipping take within the US?
answer: Standard shipping within the contiguous US typically takes 3-5 business days after order processing. Expedited options like Next-Day or 2-Day are available at checkout for faster delivery.

question: What are TechNova's international shipping destinations?
answer: TechNova ships to over 120 countries worldwide, excluding certain restricted regions. You can view the full list of supported countries during checkout before placing your order.

question: Can I track my TechNova order?
answer: Yes, all TechNova orders include real-time tracking once shipped. You’ll receive a tracking email with a link to monitor your package’s progress on our carrier’s website.

question: Why is my TechNova order still processing?
answer: Processing times vary by product availability and order volume, typically taking 1-3 business days. You’ll receive an email notification once your order ships with tracking details.

question: How do I change my shipping address after placing an order?
answer: If your order hasn’t shipped yet, contact support immediately with your order number and new address. Once shipped, address changes may not be possible—track your package instead.

question: Does TechNova offer weekend or holiday shipping?
answer: TechNova processes and ships orders Monday through Friday. Weekend or holiday deliveries depend on the carrier’s schedule and are not guaranteed.

question: What carriers does TechNova use for shipping?
answer: TechNova partners with major carriers like SwiftLogistics, Horizon Express, and MetroParcel for domestic and international deliveries. Carrier selection depends on your location and chosen shipping method.

question: Can I get a delivery estimate before placing my order?
answer: Yes, during checkout, you’ll see estimated delivery dates based on your shipping method and destination. These estimates are subject to change based on carrier performance.

question: What happens if my TechNova package is delayed?
answer: Delays may occur due to weather, customs, or carrier issues. Check your tracking for updates or contact support for assistance after the estimated delivery window passes.

question: Does TechNova ship to PO boxes?
answer: TechNova does not ship to PO boxes for security reasons. Please provide a physical street address or a valid business address for delivery.

question: How do I know if my international TechNova order is stuck in customs?
answer: If your package is delayed in customs, you’ll receive an email notification with next steps. Contact support with your tracking number for further assistance.

question: Can I split my TechNova order into multiple shipments?
answer: TechNova processes orders as a single shipment, but some items may ship separately if they’re pre-ordered or backordered. You’ll receive separate tracking for each shipment.

question: What is TechNova’s policy on shipping to Alaska or Hawaii?
answer: Shipping to Alaska and Hawaii is available but may take longer and incur additional fees. These costs are calculated at checkout based on your selected shipping method.

question: How do I request a signature upon delivery for my TechNova package?
answer: Signature requirements can be added during checkout for an additional fee. If not selected, packages will be left at your doorstep if no one is available to sign.

question: Why does my TechNova tracking show 'in transit' for days?
answer: Carriers sometimes update tracking statuses less frequently during transit. If the delay exceeds the estimated window, contact support for clarification.

question: Does TechNova offer free shipping?
answer: Free standard shipping is available on orders over $99 within the US. International free shipping thresholds vary by country—check your cart for details.

question: Can I ship my TechNova order to a different country than my billing address?
answer: Yes, but you may need to provide additional customs information during checkout. Ensure the shipping address matches the recipient’s location to avoid delays.

question: What should I do if my TechNova package is damaged upon arrival?
answer: Inspect your package immediately upon delivery. If damaged, take photos and contact support within 7 days for a replacement or refund.

question: How do I ship a TechNova product to a friend or family member?
answer: During checkout, enter the recipient’s address in the shipping section. You can include a gift message, but the order will still be charged to your payment method.

question: Does TechNova ship to military bases or APO/FPO addresses?
answer: Yes, TechNova ships to APO/FPO addresses using USPS or designated military carriers. Delivery times may vary based on base location.

question: Why is my TechNova order shipping from a different warehouse?
answer: TechNova fulfills orders from the nearest available warehouse to reduce transit times. Your package may ship from a different location than expected.

question: Can I reroute my TechNova package to a different address after it ships?
answer: Once shipped, rerouting may not be possible. Contact support immediately with your tracking number to explore options, as fees or restrictions may apply.

question: What is TechNova’s policy on shipping to restricted countries?
answer: TechNova cannot ship to countries under trade embargoes or sanctions. Check the supported countries list during checkout to confirm eligibility.

question: How do I know if my TechNova order qualifies for expedited shipping?
answer: Expedited shipping options appear at checkout if your order meets the minimum order value and destination requirements. Select your preferred method before completing payment.

question: What happens if my TechNova package is returned to sender?
answer: If undeliverable, the carrier will attempt redelivery or hold the package for pickup. Contact support with your tracking number to resolve the issue or request a refund.

question: How do I start a return for a TechNova laptop?
answer: Visit your TechNova account dashboard and select the device under 'My Orders.' Click 'Start Return' and follow the prompts to generate a return shipping label.

question: What is TechNova's return window for hardware products?
answer: TechNova hardware products can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided they are in original condition.

question: Can I return a TechNova smart device if the box is damaged but the device is fine?
answer: Yes, as long as the device itself is undamaged and in its original packaging, you may return it within the 30-day window.

question: How long does it take to process a refund after TechNova receives my returned item?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after TechNova receives and inspects the returned item.

question: What happens if my returned TechNova laptop arrives damaged?
answer: If the laptop is damaged upon arrival at our facility, we will contact you to assess the issue and determine next steps, which may include a replacement.

question: Can I exchange a TechNova laptop for a different model?
answer: Yes, exchanges for a different model are available within the 30-day return window, subject to stock availability.

question: Do I need to include the original accessories when returning a TechNova product?
answer: Yes, all original accessories must be included with the return to avoid delays or partial refunds.

question: How do I request an RMA for a defective TechNova product?
answer: Contact TechNova support with your order details and describe the issue. They will provide an RMA number and return instructions.

question: Is there a restocking fee for returning a TechNova product?
answer: TechNova does not charge restocking fees for returns made within the 30-day window, provided the product is in original condition.

question: Can I return a TechNova product if I changed my mind?
answer: Yes, TechNova accepts returns for products purchased within the last 30 days due to buyer’s remorse, as long as the item is unused.

question: What should I do if my TechNova order arrived missing items?
answer: Contact TechNova support immediately with your order number and photos of the missing items. We will arrange a replacement or refund.

question: How do I return a TechNova accessory like a mouse or keyboard?
answer: Accessories can be returned following the same process as hardware products, with a 30-day return window and full refund eligibility.

question: Can I return a TechNova product after 30 days?
answer: TechNova’s standard return policy is 30 days, but exceptions may apply for defective items—contact support to discuss your case.

question: What is the refund method for returned TechNova products?
answer: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used for the purchase, typically within 5-7 business days after inspection.

question: How do I track my return shipment to TechNova?
answer: After generating your return label, you’ll receive a tracking number via email. You can monitor your shipment status through the carrier’s website.

question: What if my TechNova product is defective but still under warranty?
answer: If the issue is covered under warranty, contact support for a repair or replacement—no return shipping is required in most cases.

question: Can I return a TechNova product purchased from a third-party seller?
answer: TechNova’s return policy applies only to products purchased directly from TechNova. For third-party purchases, contact the seller directly.

question: How do I cancel a return request for a TechNova product?
answer: Log in to your TechNova account, navigate to 'My Orders,' and cancel the return request before the item is shipped back.

question: What happens if I miss the 30-day return window for a TechNova product?
answer: After 30 days, TechNova cannot process returns for refunds, but you may still qualify for warranty support if the product is defective.

question: Do I need to pay for return shipping on a TechNova product?
answer: TechNova provides a prepaid return shipping label for eligible returns—no out-of-pocket costs are required for customers.

question: What are the key features of the TechNova ProBook X1?
answer: The TechNova ProBook X1 includes a 14-inch 4K OLED display, Intel Core i7 processor, 16GB RAM, 1TB SSD storage, Thunderbolt 4 ports, and a backlit keyboard with fingerprint reader for enhanced security.

question: Does the TechNova SmartDesk Pro support wireless charging?
answer: Yes, the TechNova SmartDesk Pro features a built-in Qi wireless charging pad on the right side of the desk surface, compatible with most Qi-enabled devices.

question: Is the TechNova Luna Display compatible with macOS Ventura?
answer: Yes, the TechNova Luna Display is fully compatible with macOS Ventura and later versions, ensuring seamless integration with your Apple devices.

question: How do I set up the TechNova AirPods Pro case with my laptop?
answer: Simply plug the TechNova AirPods Pro case into a USB-C or USB-A port on your laptop using the included cable, then press and hold the pairing button on the case until the LED indicator flashes white.

question: Why isn't my TechNova SmartPen charging?
answer: First, ensure the pen is properly seated in the charging dock and the dock is powered on. If the issue persists, try a different USB port or contact support for further assistance.

question: What is the battery life of the TechNova SmartWatch Series 3?
answer: The TechNova SmartWatch Series 3 offers up to 7 days of battery life with typical usage, including notifications, fitness tracking, and heart rate monitoring.

question: Can I use the TechNova StreamCam with Zoom on a Windows 10 PC?
answer: Yes, the TechNova StreamCam is fully compatible with Zoom on Windows 10 and later versions, with plug-and-play functionality for easy setup.

question: How do I reset the TechNova SmartRouter to factory settings?
answer: Press and hold the reset button on the back of the router for 10 seconds until the LED indicator flashes red, then release to restore factory settings.

question: What are the dimensions and weight of the TechNova ProBook X1?
answer: The TechNova ProBook X1 measures 12.8 x 8.6 x 0.6 inches and weighs approximately 2.8 pounds, making it lightweight and portable for on-the-go professionals.

question: Does the TechNova SmartDesk Pro come with cable management features?
answer: Yes, the TechNova SmartDesk Pro includes built-in cable management trays and clips to keep your workspace organized and free of clutter.

question: How do I pair the TechNova Luna Display with my iPad?
answer: Enable Bluetooth on your iPad, open the TechNova Luna app, and follow the on-screen instructions to pair the display with your device.

question: What should I do if my TechNova AirPods Pro case isn't connecting to my phone?
answer: Ensure Bluetooth is enabled on your phone, reset the AirPods case by holding the pairing button for 15 seconds, and then attempt to reconnect.

question: What is the warranty period for the TechNova ProBook X1?
answer: The TechNova ProBook X1 comes with a 2-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects and hardware malfunctions.

question: Can I upgrade the RAM in the TechNova ProBook X1?
answer: No, the RAM in the TechNova ProBook X1 is soldered to the motherboard and cannot be upgraded after purchase.

question: How do I update the firmware on the TechNova SmartPen?
answer: Connect the TechNova SmartPen to your laptop via USB, open the TechNova Hub app, and follow the prompts to check for and install firmware updates.

question: What is the maximum screen resolution supported by the TechNova StreamCam?
answer: The TechNova StreamCam supports up to 4K resolution at 30 frames per second, ensuring crisp and clear video quality for streaming and video calls.

question: Why is my TechNova SmartWatch Series 3 not syncing with the app?
answer: Ensure your phone's Bluetooth is enabled and the TechNova app is updated. Restart both your watch and phone, then attempt to sync again.

question: Does the TechNova SmartRouter support mesh networking?
answer: Yes, the TechNova SmartRouter supports mesh networking, allowing you to expand your Wi-Fi coverage by adding compatible TechNova mesh nodes.

question: How do I clean the screen of the TechNova ProBook X1?
answer: Use a microfiber cloth lightly dampened with isopropyl alcohol (70% concentration) to gently wipe the screen. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials.

question: What is the operating temperature range for the TechNova SmartDesk Pro?
answer: The TechNova SmartDesk Pro operates optimally between 50°F and 95°F (10°C and 35°C). Avoid placing it in direct sunlight or extreme temperatures.

question: Can I use the TechNova Luna Display with multiple devices simultaneously?
answer: No, the TechNova Luna Display can only be paired with one device at a time. You will need to disconnect and reconnect when switching between devices.

question: How do I check the battery status of the TechNova SmartPen?
answer: Open the TechNova Hub app on your laptop or mobile device, and the battery status of your SmartPen will be displayed in the device settings.

question: What is the weight capacity of the TechNova SmartDesk Pro?
answer: The TechNova SmartDesk Pro has a weight capacity of 200 pounds, ensuring stability even with multiple monitors and accessories.

question: Why is my TechNova StreamCam showing a black screen during calls?
answer: Check that the camera lens is clean and not obstructed. Ensure the correct camera is selected in your video conferencing software and that no other app is using the camera.

question: Does the TechNova SmartWatch Series 3 track sleep patterns?
answer: Yes, the TechNova SmartWatch Series 3 includes advanced sleep tracking features, providing insights into your sleep stages, duration, and overall sleep quality.

question: Does TechNova offer discounts for students or educators?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides verified student and educator discounts on both software subscriptions and hardware purchases. You can verify your eligibility through our partner portal and apply the discount at checkout.

question: How do I apply a promo code to my TechNova purchase?
answer: Enter your promo code in the designated field during checkout before finalizing your order. Codes are case-sensitive and must be valid at the time of purchase.

question: Are there any seasonal sales or holiday promotions available?
answer: TechNova runs seasonal promotions throughout the year, including Black Friday, holiday bundles, and back-to-school events. Subscribe to our newsletter to receive notifications about upcoming offers.

question: Can I combine multiple promo codes on a single order?
answer: No, TechNova allows only one promo code per order. If you have multiple codes, you may apply the one with the highest discount value.

question: What is TechNova's volume pricing policy for businesses?
answer: TechNova offers tiered volume pricing for businesses purchasing 10 or more licenses or devices. Contact our sales team for a customized quote based on your organization's needs.

question: Do you offer discounts for non-profit organizations?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides special pricing for registered non-profits. Submit your organization’s documentation during the checkout process or contact support for assistance.

question: How long does a TechNova free trial last?
answer: TechNova’s free trial for software subscriptions lasts 14 days, with full access to premium features. Hardware purchases do not qualify for free trials but include a 30-day return policy.

question: Can I extend my TechNova free trial beyond the standard period?
answer: Free trial extensions are not available, but you can upgrade to a paid plan at any time during the trial. After expiration, you may re-register for a new trial after 30 days.

question: Does TechNova offer a money-back guarantee on hardware purchases?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides a 30-day money-back guarantee on all hardware purchases, provided the device is returned in its original condition. Software subscriptions are non-refundable after activation.

question: How do I contact TechNova sales for a custom quote?
answer: You can reach our sales team via the contact form on our website or by calling our support line during business hours. A representative will respond within 24 hours to discuss your requirements.

question: What payment methods does TechNova accept for bulk orders?
answer: TechNova accepts credit cards, bank transfers, and purchase orders for bulk orders. Contact our sales team to arrange payment terms that suit your organization.

question: Does TechNova offer financing options for hardware purchases?
answer: Yes, TechNova partners with financial providers to offer flexible financing plans for hardware purchases. Select the financing option at checkout to see available terms.

question: How does TechNova compare to [Competitor X] in terms of pricing?
answer: TechNova’s pricing is competitive, with transparent tiered plans and no hidden fees. Unlike some competitors, we include premium support and extended warranties at no extra cost.

question: Can I get a discount if I purchase a TechNova laptop and software bundle?
answer: Yes, TechNova offers bundle discounts when you purchase a laptop with compatible software or accessories. The discount is automatically applied at checkout.

question: Are there any restrictions on using TechNova promo codes?
answer: Promo codes may have minimum purchase requirements or exclusions on certain products. Review the terms and conditions linked to each code before applying it.

question: Does TechNova offer group discounts for families or small teams?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides group discounts for families or small teams purchasing multiple licenses. Contact support with your group size to receive a personalized discount code.

question: How can I check if my organization qualifies for TechNova’s B2B pricing?
answer: Visit our B2B pricing page and enter your organization’s details to see if you qualify for volume discounts. A sales representative will follow up if further verification is needed.

question: What happens if my promo code expires before I use it?
answer: Expired promo codes cannot be used for new purchases. However, you may check our website for new promotions or contact support for assistance.

question: Does TechNova offer discounts for government or military purchases?
answer: Yes, TechNova provides special pricing for government agencies and active military personnel. Submit your credentials during checkout or contact sales for verification.

question: Can I negotiate a custom pricing plan with TechNova for large orders?
answer: Yes, TechNova’s enterprise sales team can work with you to create a custom pricing plan for orders exceeding 100 units. Contact us to discuss your requirements.
